input.question: How many users signed up last week?
input.schema: users(id int, email text, signed_up_at timestamp)

expected.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE signed_up_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
expected.explanation: Counts users whose signup timestamp is within the last 7 days.

input.question: Top 5 customers by total order value in 2024
input.schema:
customers(id int, name text)
orders(id int, customer_id int, total_usd numeric, placed_at timestamp)

expected.query: SELECT c.name, SUM(o.total_usd) AS total FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.placed_at) = 2024 GROUP BY c.name ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 5
expected.explanation: Sums each customer's 2024 order totals and returns the top 5.
